productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Solid White Shirt
description: Composition Crisp white shirt, made of blended cotton, has full sleeves with double buttoned cuffs, spread collar, buttoned placket with pearlescent white buttons, patch pocket on the left chest with stitch detailing and a curved hem Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash separately using mild detergent Do not dry clean, do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Choose your favourites from the great range of mark taylor formal shirts available on myntra. Impeccable construction, attention to detail and the soft shine to the fabric place this shirt firmly ahead of the pack – wear with confidence tucked into formal trousers.
